title: YouTube Poop: Humble Pie
description:
The Tick doesn't know the meaning of the phrase humble pie.

But it's okay, because he's not dumb.

----------------------------

Whoo hoo! My very 2nd YouTube Poop, and I dunno if it's because of my previous one (Billo Wants To Get Silly) or not, but I've got a subscriber now. Yippee!

....Ish.

Come on, let me have my moment.

I dunno if someone's already made a The Tick poop, but this is the first one I know of.

If'n you have a video response make it a The Tick vid.
